checks.evidence: Pricing page describes platform as covering sales funnels, email marketing, online courses, communities, affiliate marketing, etc. Header says 'All-in-one business platform'. Plan comparison table includes funnels, emails, courses, communities, affiliates.
API docs state: 'To authenticate with the Systeme.io Public API, your only option right now is to attach your API key to the X-API-Key header of each request.'
Pricing page shows Free plan at $0 with 'No credit card required'. API requests per minute listed on Free plan (30 req/min), confirming API access without payment.

API reference shows documented REST endpoints for Community, Contact, ContactField, Funnels, Mailing/Newsletter, Page Editor, Subscription, School/Courses/Enrollments, Tag, Webhook. Cursor-based pagination, merge-patch support, rate limiting documented.

MCP Server docs page confirms official MCP server: 'The Systeme.io MCP server is in its initial release.' Docs describe authentication via X-MCP-Key header or mcpKey query parameter, and supported operations (contacts, tags, newsletters).

All above factors align: free self-serve plan with API access, well-documented REST API, official MCP server, no credit-card required, rate limits documented per plan. No material blockers present in rendered pages.
